originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'k_crcs' is never read

reasoning: 5275b1e49f6.c L25: 'k_crcs=someInt' dead store. The value assigned to k_crcs at L25 is never subsequently read. PC=CONFIG_FEATURE_INSMOD_VERSION_CHECKING=T correctly constrains the condition for this code to exist. No library macros (clean PRODUCT analysis). New bug. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_70 (TRUE_NEW_OVER with library macros); PRODUCT version is correctly constrained.
